# devcompanion
Description: Full DevCompanion API client — projects, chats, AI completion, context management, snippets, docs, and research via a CLI script.
Source: project
Triggers: devcompanion, dc_api, chat completion, code vault, context summary, generate files, project context
Tools: bash_run, run_skill_script
Scripts: devcompanion.py
# DevCompanion Skill

## When to use
Use this skill whenever the user asks to:
- Interact with the DevCompanion API (projects, chats, messages, snippets, docs, research)
- Run AI chat completions via DevCompanion
- Manage context health / generate context summaries
- Generate project files via the `/generate` endpoint
- Save or retrieve code snippets from the Code Vault

## API Details
- **Base URL:** `https://yhzzdjfgxhpudakpsjhj.supabase.co/functions/v1/api-gateway`
- **Auth header:** `x-api-key: <key>`
- **API Key env var:** `DEVCOMPANION_API_KEY`

## Script: devcompanion.py
A full CLI wrapping every endpoint. Run via `run_skill_script`.

### Usage
```
python devcompanion.py <command> [options]
```

### Commands
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `health` | API health check |
| `projects list/get/create/update/delete/context` | Project CRUD |
| `chats list/get/create/delete` | Chat management |
| `messages list/create` | Message operations |
| `complete "<message>"` | AI chat completion |
| `context health/generate/clear/load` | Context memory management |
| `generate "<goal>"` | Bulk file generation |
| `snippets list/get/create/delete/export/bundle` | Code Vault |
| `docs list/get/create/update/delete` | Document operations |
| `research list/search/create/delete` | Research operations |

### Context Health Workflow
After any `complete` call, check `context_health.status`:
1. `healthy` → keep going
2. `warning`/`critical` → run `context generate --chat-id <id>`, then `context clear --chat-id <id> --summary "<summary>"`

## API Key Storage
Store as env var `DEVCOMPANION_API_KEY`. Falls back to hardcoded default in script.
